'''竏嗜g-dh-sh''' ('''kangadhash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pepper|pepper]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-dh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pepper|pepper]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗜g-dh-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kangadhash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingadhash|thingadhash]] || [[word:jingadhash|jingadhash]] || [[word:shingadhash|shingadhash]] || [[word:kingadhash|kingadhash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungadhash|thuthungadhash]] || [[word:jujungadhash|jujungadhash]] || [[word:shushungadhash|shushungadhash]] || [[word:kukungadhash|kukungadhash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungadhash|thungadhash]] || [[word:jungadhash|jungadhash]] || [[word:shungadhash|shungadhash]] || [[word:kungadhash|kungadhash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungadhash|thungadhash]] || [[word:jungadhash|jungadhash]] || [[word:shungadhash|shungadhash]] || [[word:kungadhash|kungadhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengadhash|thengadhash]] || [[word:jengadhash|jengadhash]] || [[word:shengadhash|shengadhash]] || [[word:kengadhash|kengadhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongadhash|thothongadhash]] || [[word:jojongadhash|jojongadhash]] || [[word:shoshongadhash|shoshongadhash]] || [[word:kokongadhash|kokongadhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongadhash|thongadhash]] || [[word:jongadhash|jongadhash]] || [[word:shongadhash|shongadhash]] || [[word:kongadhash|kongadhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongadhash|thongadhash]] || [[word:jongadhash|jongadhash]] || [[word:shongadhash|shongadhash]] || [[word:kongadhash|kongadhash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]] || [[word:ngadhash|ngadhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦngadhash|thﾃｦngadhash]] || [[word:jﾃｦngadhash|jﾃｦngadhash]] || [[word:shﾃｦngadhash|shﾃｦngadhash]] || [[word:kﾃｦngadhash|kﾃｦngadhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangadhash|thathangadhash]] || [[word:jajangadhash|jajangadhash]] || [[word:shashangadhash|shashangadhash]] || [[word:kakangadhash|kakangadhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangadhash|thangadhash]] || [[word:jangadhash|jangadhash]] || [[word:shangadhash|shangadhash]] || [[word:kangadhash|kangadhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangadhash|thangadhash]] || [[word:jangadhash|jangadhash]] || [[word:shangadhash|shangadhash]] || [[word:kangadhash|kangadhash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangadhash|shangadhash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangadhash|goshangadhash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangadhash|gokishangadhash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangadhashnﾃｼ|shangadhashnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangadhashnknﾃｼ|goshangadhashnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangadhashnﾃｼ|gokishangadhashnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangadhashshﾃｫ|shangadhashshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkshﾃｫ|goshangadhashnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangadhashshﾃｫ|gokishangadhashshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangadhashro|shangadhashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkro|goshangadhashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangadhashro|gokishangadhashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangadhashmu|shangadhashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkmu|goshangadhashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangadhashmu|gokishangadhashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangadhashsher|shangadhashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangadhashnksher|goshangadhashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangadhashsher|gokishangadhashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangadhashng|shangadhashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkng|goshangadhashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangadhashng|gokishangadhashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangadhashya|shangadhashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkya|goshangadhashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangadhashya|gokishangadhashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangadhashyam|shangadhashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkyam|goshangadhashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangadhashyam|gokishangadhashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangadhashnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shangadhashnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangadhashnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshangadhashnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangadhashnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishangadhashnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangadhashnﾃｼro|shangadhashnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangadhashnknﾃｼro|goshangadhashnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangadhashnﾃｼro|gokishangadhashnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangadhashnﾃｼmu|shangadhashnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangadhashnknﾃｼmu|goshangadhashnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangadhashnﾃｼmu|gokishangadhashnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangadhashshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shangadhashshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshangadhashnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangadhashshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishangadhashshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangadhashshﾃｫro|shangadhashshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkshﾃｫro|goshangadhashnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangadhashshﾃｫro|gokishangadhashshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangadhashshﾃｫmu|shangadhashshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkshﾃｫmu|goshangadhashnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangadhashshﾃｫmu|gokishangadhashshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangadhashronﾃｼ|shangadhashronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkronﾃｼ|goshangadhashnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangadhashronﾃｼ|gokishangadhashronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangadhashroshﾃｫ|shangadhashroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkroshﾃｫ|goshangadhashnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangadhashroshﾃｫ|gokishangadhashroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangadhashromu|shangadhashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkromu|goshangadhashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangadhashromu|gokishangadhashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangadhashmunﾃｼ|shangadhashmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkmunﾃｼ|goshangadhashnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangadhashmunﾃｼ|gokishangadhashmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangadhashmushﾃｫ|shangadhashmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkmushﾃｫ|goshangadhashnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangadhashmushﾃｫ|gokishangadhashmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangadhashmuro|shangadhashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangadhashnkmuro|goshangadhashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangadhashmuro|gokishangadhashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
